ddls:
CREATE TABLE "baby_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baby name record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender associated with the name (Foreign Key) */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decade when the name was popular (Foreign Key) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the name during the specified decade */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (Foreign Key) */,
  "data_quality_score" TEXT /* Data quality score of the name record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_decade_id FOREIGN KEY ("decade_id") REFERENCES decades ("decade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade */,
  "decade_description" TEXT /* Description of the decade */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the decade */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was submitted */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the data */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name submitted by the user */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender associated with the name submission */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decade associated with the name submission */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the name during the specified decade */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the name was submitted */,
  "data_quality_score" TEXT /* Data quality score of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_submissions_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_submissions_decade_id FOREIGN KEY ("decade_id") REFERENCES decades ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the name */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the name was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_views_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the search query was made */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_comments_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby name rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_ratings_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)
